name: EvenNav
tagline: Google Maps navigation on your glasses
description: Turn-by-turn navigation with map overlay for walking, cycling, and transit modes. Shows directions, ETA, and a live map on your Even G2 glasses.
author: EvenNav

permissions.name: network
permissions.desc: Access Google Maps APIs for directions, places, and map tiles

permissions.name: location
permissions.desc: Track your position for navigation and map display
